Composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and complete main.py to ensure proper Flask app initialization and correct import of route blueprints. Specifically 
- Resolve the "ModuleNotFoundError  No module named 'routes'" by ensuring all route modules (dashboard.py, listings.py, job_details.py, application_form.py, tracking.py, companies.py, resumes.py, search_results.py) are placed inside a 'routes' directory at the same level as main.py.
- Add an __init__.py file inside the 'routes' directory to mark it as a package.
- Adjust import statements in main.py to correctly import blueprints from the 'routes' package.
- Verify that the Flask app runs on local port 5000 and the first page is accessible at route '/' (Dashboard page).
- This task is foundational and must be completed before frontend route handlers and utilities can be integrated.
Composition.Programmer 2:
Implement and/or fix routes/dashboard.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Dashboard page route and handlers as per the requirements document.
- Display featured job postings (latest 3 jobs sorted by posted_date descending) with company names.
- Implement navigation buttons to Job Listings, Application Tracking, and Companies Directory pages.
- Ensure all element IDs and page titles match the specification.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure the route blueprint is correctly registered and accessible.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 3:
Implement and/or fix routes/listings.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Job Listings page route and handlers with search and filter capabilities.
- Support filtering by job title, company, location, category, and location type (Remote, On-site, Hybrid).
- Display job cards with title, company, location, and salary range.
- Ensure UI elements use the specified element IDs.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration and with Programmer 2 for consistent navigation.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 4:
Implement and/or fix routes/job_details.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Job Details page route and handlers to display detailed job information.
- Include job title, company name, description, salary range, and location.
- Implement the "Apply Now" button that redirects to the Application Form page with the job_id parameter.
- Ensure element IDs and page title match the requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 5:
Implement and/or fix routes/application_form.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Application Form page route and handlers to allow users to submit applications.
- Validate inputs  applicant name, email, resume file upload (allowed types), and cover letter.
- Save uploaded resume files securely in 'uploads/resumes' folder.
- Save application and resume metadata to respective text files.
- Provide user feedback on errors and success.
- Ensure element IDs and page title match the requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 6:
Implement and/or fix routes/tracking.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Application Tracking page route and handlers.
- Display all submitted applications with status filtering.
- Provide detailed application view per application.
- Implement navigation back to dashboard.
- Ensure element IDs and page title match the requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 7:
Implement and/or fix routes/companies.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Companies Directory page route and handlers with search functionality.
- Implement Company Profile page with detailed company info and open jobs.
- Implement navigation back to dashboard and companies directory.
- Ensure element IDs and page title match the requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 8:
Implement and/or fix routes/resumes.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Resume Management page route and handlers.
- Support uploading, listing, and deleting resumes.
- Validate uploaded files and save them securely.
- Implement navigation back to dashboard.
- Ensure element IDs and page title match the requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 9:
Implement and/or fix routes/search_results.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement the Search Results page route and handlers.
- Support searching jobs and companies with tabbed results.
- Display no-results message when applicable.
- Ensure element IDs and page title match the requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 for blueprint registration.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.
Composition.Programmer 10:
Implement utils/validators.py with the following detailed requirements 
- Implement input validation functions for email, required fields, and allowed file types.
- Implement filename sanitization using secure methods.
- Provide utility functions for date formatting and ID generation if needed.
- Integrate these utilities into backend services and route handlers to ensure robust error handling and user feedback.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 and all route programmers to ensure validation is used consistently.
- This task depends on Programmer 1 completing the main app setup.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of ALL pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
